sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel data documented for NES version

special_mechanics.name: Dinosaur Partner System
special_mechanics.description: Player can collect and ride one of five color-coded dinosaur species with unique abilities: Pteranodon (flight), Elasmosaurus (fast swimming), ice-grip dinosaur, lava-traversal dinosaur. Dinosaur abandons player when hit.

special_mechanics.name: Swimming
special_mechanics.description: Master Higgins can swim through water sections, with dinosaur partners providing enhanced swim speed

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Player selects weapon at level start (boomerangs, axes) to break eggs and defeat enemies

tier_notes: Tier 3 (T3) - Empirical/qualitative data only. Available sources are archival/wiki documentation and Wikipedia article that describe gameplay mechanics and features but contain no precise physics parameters, numerical values, or technical specifications. Movement physics values not documented in publicly available sources.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Hudson's Adventure Island III
